summary: The protagonist, a young human named Rion, is facing two Dire Wolves and must use his skills to defeat them. He discovers that he has the ability to perform Body Fortification, a hidden martial art passed down through generations of the Tiger Tribe. With this newfound power, Rion takes on the wolves and eventually kills one. The old man who sent him on this mission is pleased with his progress but also impressed by Rion's natural talent.
key_moments: Rion discovers he can perform Body Fortification
He uses this ability to kill one of the Dire Wolves
The old man is impressed by Rion's natural talent and decides to take him on as his disciple
